mapper.sql: id, company_subject_id, accountant_name, accounting_start_date, profit_unit_name, profit_unit_code, platform, brand_name, category_name, dept_name, dept_owner_job_no, dept_owner_name, region_name, project_group, project_owner_name, owner_job_no, owner_name, store_auth_id, store_code, store_name, account_id, deal_type, live_room_type, accounting_basis, register_mobile, register_real_name, register_referrer, register_date, deposit_amount, start_date, transfer_date, stop_date, is_enabled, is_authorized, qianchuan_account_id, qianchuan_account_name, qianchuan_mobile, qianchuan_company_subject, qianchuan_auth, verify_record, uid, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: select from biz_profit_unit where profit_unit_code = #{profitUnitCode} limit 1
select from biz_profit_unit where profit_unit_name = #{profitUnitName} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into biz_profit_unit ( company_subject_id, accountant_name, accounting_start_date, profit_unit_name, profit_unit_code, platform, brand_name, category_name, dept_name, dept_owner_job_no, dept_owner_name, region_name, project_group, project_owner_name, owner_job_no, owner_name, store_auth_id, store_code, store_name, account_id, deal_type, live_room_type, accounting_basis, register_mobile, register_real_name, register_referrer, register_date, deposit_amount, start_date, transfer_date, stop_date, is_enabled, is_authorized, qianchuan_account_id, qianchuan_account_name, qianchuan_mobile, qianchuan_company_subject, qianchuan_auth, verify_record, uid, status, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{companySubjectId}, #{accountantName}, #{accountingStartDate}, #{profitUnitName}, #{profitUnitCode}, #{platform}, #{brandName}, #{categoryName}, #{deptName}, #{deptOwnerJobNo}, #{deptOwnerName}, #{regionName}, #{projectGroup}, #{projectOwnerName}, #{ownerJobNo}, #{ownerName}, #{storeAuthId}, #{storeCode}, #{storeName}, #{accountId}, #{dealType}, #{liveRoomType}, #{accountingBasis}, #{registerMobile}, #{registerRealName}, #{registerReferrer}, #{registerDate}, #{depositAmount}, #{startDate}, #{transferDate}, #{stopDate}, #{isEnabled}, #{isAuthorized}, #{qianchuanAccountId}, #{qianchuanAccountName}, #{qianchuanMobile}, #{qianchuanCompanySubject}, #{qianchuanAuth}, #{verifyRecord}, #{uid}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now() )

insert into biz_profit_unit ( company_subject_id, accountant_name, accounting_start_date, profit_unit_name, profit_unit_code, platform, brand_name, category_name, dept_name, dept_owner_job_no, dept_owner_name, region_name, project_group, project_owner_name, owner_job_no, owner_name, store_auth_id, store_code, store_name, account_id, deal_type, live_room_type, accounting_basis, register_mobile, register_real_name, register_referrer, register_date, deposit_amount, start_date, transfer_date, stop_date, is_enabled, is_authorized, qianchuan_account_id, qianchuan_account_name, qianchuan_mobile, qianchuan_company_subject, qianchuan_auth, verify_record, uid, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{companySubjectId}, #{accountantName}, #{accountingStartDate}, #{profitUnitName}, #{profitUnitCode}, #{platform}, #{brandName}, #{categoryName}, #{deptName}, #{deptOwnerJobNo}, #{deptOwnerName}, #{regionName}, #{projectGroup}, #{projectOwnerName}, #{ownerJobNo}, #{ownerName}, #{storeAuthId}, #{storeCode}, #{storeName}, #{accountId}, #{dealType}, #{liveRoomType}, #{accountingBasis}, #{registerMobile}, #{registerRealName}, #{registerReferrer}, #{registerDate}, #{depositAmount}, #{startDate}, #{transferDate}, #{stopDate}, #{isEnabled}, #{isAuthorized}, #{qianchuanAccountId}, #{qianchuanAccountName}, #{qianchuanMobile}, #{qianchuanCompanySubject}, #{qianchuanAuth}, #{verifyRecord}, #{uid}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now() ) on duplicate key update company_subject_id = values(company_subject_id), accountant_name = values(accountant_name), accounting_start_date = values(accounting_start_date), profit_unit_code = values(profit_unit_code), platform = values(platform), brand_name = values(brand_name), category_name = values(category_name), dept_name = values(dept_name), dept_owner_job_no = values(dept_owner_job_no), dept_owner_name = values(dept_owner_name), region_name = values(region_name), project_group = values(project_group), project_owner_name = values(project_owner_name), owner_job_no = values(owner_job_no), store_auth_id = values(store_auth_id), store_code = values(store_code), store_name = values(store_name), account_id = values(account_id), live_room_type = values(live_room_type), accounting_basis = values(accounting_basis), register_mobile = values(register_mobile), register_real_name = values(register_real_name), register_referrer = values(register_referrer), register_date = values(register_date), deposit_amount = values(deposit_amount), stop_date = values(stop_date), is_enabled = values(is_enabled), is_authorized = values(is_authorized), qianchuan_account_id = values(qianchuan_account_id), qianchuan_account_name = values(qianchuan_account_name), qianchuan_mobile = values(qianchuan_mobile), qianchuan_company_subject = values(qianchuan_company_subject), qianchuan_auth = values(qianchuan_auth), verify_record = values(verify_record), uid = values(uid), status = values(status), remark = values(remark), update_by = values(update_by), update_time = now()
